creator: malus.x@gmail.com
text:
Hey,

I'm not sure if this is being actively worked on. However, I took the 
time to write my own version of the port today, prior to realizing that 
work had already been done on this.

My port is pretty similar, but I added some KDE specific knobs, cleaned 
up the pkg-plist, updated it to version 0.3, changed its home to 
security, saved the distfile to the KDE subdirectory, and followed the 
naming convention used in gaim-otr.

Feel free to take anything that I've done and put it in your version. If 
you don't want to work on it anymore, I wouldn't mind working on it. Thanks!

Sincerely,
Dave Grochowski
